name: Grenadier
description:
Fires arcing, grenade-like explosive spheres that are pulled down by gravity. Each trigger pull consumes 3 rounds. Projectiles ricochet off surfaces; after the second bounce they rapidly lose speed and come to rest. They detonate on hitting an enemy at any point, or 1 second after stopping.

The explosion deals 100 percent of the card damage as splash in a small radius, with no separate direct-hit impact damage. Grenade, splash, and rocket launcher damage bonuses do not boost this damage, but general gun damage bonuses do.
notes:
Only appears at green rarity or above.

Explosive versions benefit from Axton's Duty Calls; non-explosive elements do not.

Sells for far more than most assault rifles of similar level and rarity.

Detonating projectiles can be absorbed by Absorption Shields; when absorbed they are converted into rocket launcher ammo, not assault rifle ammo.

World drop from any appropriate loot source.
